prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为22555→26762→27123→31944→34573，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约12000名；2025年基准位次约34573名，较2024年后移约 2629名，后移速度有所加快；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为83→83→91→92→97人，持续小幅扩招；2026年计划97人，与2025年持平，扩 招趋势暂停，对竞争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年持续上升，2021年第162名→2026年第134名，学校综合实力稳步提升 ，对考生吸引力有所增强；2023年声誉评价偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍条件改善）；2026年抖音热度排名第86位（样本14条视频，综合热度225003），评价为" 一般"，无明显负面舆情或断档信号；2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降的讨论，但近年已趋稳；畜牧学A、作物学A-，在农林类高校中学科实力突出；动物科学、种 子科学与工程等优势专业与学校特色一致，对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，该校相 关专业（计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、数据科学与大数据技术、能源与动力工程等）报考竞争加剧；湖南省物理类考生总数从2025年320192人增至2026年347000人，增幅约8. 4%，竞争环境明显收紧；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，距湖南省较远，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好影响；该校在湖南省招生计划占比相对稳定，未出现大幅 波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生规模显著增长（+8.4%）以及学校软科排名上升带来的吸引力增强，预计2026年竞 争进一步加剧，位次继续后移。预测最低位次约34873名，区间34373–35373名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约34873名，区间34373–35373名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（34373名以内）可重点冲刺计算机 科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（35373名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业确保录取，同时选择二档中农林特色优势专业作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 22555 → 26762 → 27123 → 31944 → 34573, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12,000 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 34,573, a backward shift of about 2,629 places compared to 2024, with the backward speed accelerating; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 83 → 83 → 91 → 92 → 97 people, with a continuous slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 97 people, unchanged from 2025, with the expansion trend paused, having limited effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University main ranking has been rising in recent years, from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, with the university's comprehensive strength steadily improving, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was relatively positive (good cafeteria service, improved dormitory conditions); in 2026, the Douyin popularity ranking was 86th (sample of 14 videos, comprehensive popularity 225,003), rated as 'average', with no obvious negative public opinion or signal of a cutoff drop; in 2022, there was discussion about the declining admission cutoff line, but it has stabilized in recent years; Animal Science is A, Crop Science is A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength among agricultural and forestry universities; advantageous majors such as Animal Science and Seed Science and Engineering are consistent with the university's characteristics, having stable appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity, and competition for related majors at this university (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.) is intensifying; the total number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, significantly tightening the competitive environment; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Hunan Province, with some regional preference affecting cross-province applications; the proportion of enrollment plans for this university in Hunan Province is relatively stable, with no major fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province (+8.4%), and the enhanced appeal due to the university's rising Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 34,873, with a range of 34,373 to 35,373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 34,873, with a range of 34,373 to 35,373. It is recommended that candidates within the ranking range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 34,373) can focus on reaching for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Data Science and Big Data Technology; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 35,373) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission, while also selecting advantageous agricultural and forestry specialty majors from Tier 2 as a stable choice.
